creditCards.name: Citi Double Cash Card
creditCards.signupBonus: $200 cash back after spending $1,500 in first 6 months

rewardsRate.all: 2% cash back (1% when you buy, 1% when you pay)

benefits: 0% intro APR on balance transfers for 18 months

creditCards.name: Citi Custom Cash Card
creditCards.signupBonus: $200 cash back after spending $1,500 in first 6 months

rewardsRate.topCategory: 5% cash back on your top eligible spend category each billing cycle (up to $500 spent, then 1%)
rewardsRate.other: 1% cash back on all other purchases
rewardsRate.eligibleCategories: Eligible 5% categories: restaurants, gas stations, grocery stores, select travel, select transit, select streaming, drugstores, home improvement stores, fitness clubs, live entertainment

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Category automatically adjusts each billing cycle
4% additional cash back on hotels, car rentals, and attractions booked on Citi Travel

creditCards.name: Citi Strata Premier
creditCards.signupBonus: 60,000 bonus ThankYou points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.travel: 3x points on air travel and hotels
rewardsRate.gas: 3x points on gas stations and EV charging
rewardsRate.portalTravel: 10x points on hotels, car rentals and attractions booked through Citi Travel

benefits: $100 off a single hotel stay of $500+ booked through Citi Travel (once per year)
Transfer points to airline and hotel partners

creditCards.name: Costco Anywhere Visa Card by Citi

rewardsRate.costcoGas: 5% cash back on gas at Costco (included in $7,000 annual cap)
rewardsRate.gas: 4% cash back on eligible gas and EV charging worldwide (up to $7,000/year combined, then 1%)
rewardsRate.travel: 3% cash back on eligible travel purchases
rewardsRate.costco: 2% cash back on all Costco and Costco.com purchases
rewardsRate.other: 1% cash back on all other purchases

benefits: No annual fee with paid Costco membership
Cash back provided as annual reward certificate in February
